hooks.command: ROOT="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}"; if [ ! -f "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/session_start.ts" ]; then SEARCH="$PWD"; while [ "$SEARCH" != "/" ]; do if [ -f "$SEARCH/.claude/hooks/session_start.ts" ]; then ROOT="$SEARCH"; break; fi; SEARCH="$(dirname "$SEARCH")"; done; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs" ]; then NODE_ENV=development node "$ROOT/node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs" "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/session_start.ts"; else NODE_ENV=development npx --yes tsx "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/session_start.ts"; fi
